input_contract: Tensor-level AIV functions accepted by the reviewed one-shot analysis; unresolved ownership blocks.
Reviewed single-point and iter-arg shapes only; unsupported scalarization blocks.
Reviewed HIVM operations with explicit temporary-buffer rules only.
Static reviewed non-contiguous reshape forms only.
AIV-local buffers and reviewed aliases; non-UB scopes are excluded from UB planning.

ub_role: change physical UB extents and layouts
input_contract: Static physical layouts or proven bounds; unresolved dynamic stride alignment blocks.
Reviewed view/cast/subview topology with resolvable physical sizes and aliases.
Operations with audited scratch-buffer rules only.
Only copies whose alias and lifetime rewrite is structurally proven.
Reviewed AIV multi-buffer marks and configured default strategies.
Exactly one selected AIV function per builder invocation; module planning invokes it independently per AIV.
